rules.rule_text:
rule PM_Dyre_Voice_Message
{
	meta:
		author = "R.Tokazowski"
		company = "PhishMe, Inc."
		URL = "http://phishme.com/two-attacks-two-dyres-infrastructure/"

	strings:
		$s1 = "voice message" nocase
		$s2 = "voice redirected message" nocase
		$s3 = "sent: " nocase

	condition:
		2 of them
}
